title: com.para.identity.defs
summary: Core identity definitions for personas, verification status, device trust, and anonymous credentials.
relationships: Personas are scoped to a single central identity managed by m8.
Anonymous identities are derived from the central identity via ZKP nullifiers.
constraints: Exactly one PARA persona per identity. Independent and Public personas are optional.
Verification status is one of: pending, verified, rejected, revoked.

fields.name: personas
fields.description: Map of persona types (para, independent, public) to display name and handle.

fields.name: verification
fields.type: { status: string; method: string; verifiedAt?: datetime }
fields.description: Citizen verification status, method used (ine, biometric, etc.), and optional timestamp.

fields.name: deviceTrust
fields.type: { level: string; development?: boolean; verifiedAt?: datetime }
fields.description: Device trust level and development mode flag for trusted device flows.

fields.name: biometricEnabled
fields.description: Whether biometric authentication is enabled for this identity session.
